description.value: Aura strong abjuration; CL 14th; Slot armor; Price 36,000 gp; Weight 30 lbs. DESCRIPTION This breastplate made from the shell of a flail snail functions as a +1 reflecting breastplate (even though that shield property cannot normally be added to armor). Once per day, the wearer can cause a spell targeted at him to reflect back at the caster, exactly like spell turning. At the GMâs discretion, the wearer can instead expend this one use per day to roll on the flail snail’s chart, randomly warping the spell in question. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells spell turning, one flail snail shell; Cost 18,000 gp
